product: Agent Bricks: Multi-Agent Supervisor is now Supervisor Agent
tagline: Agent Bricks's Multi Agent Supervisor has been renamed to Supervisor Agent.
what_it_does: Agent Bricks's Multi Agent Supervisor has been renamed to Supervisor Agent. This page describes how to use Supervisor Agent to create a multi agent supervisor system that orchestrates AI agents and tools to work together on complex tasks. You can improve their coordination based on natural language feedback from your subject matter experts.
why_it_matters: You can improve their coordination based on natural language feedback from your subject matter experts.
